Metadata.title: PURITY Fashion Studio
Metadata.description: Premium multilingual fashion studio for wardrobe, atelier, and image work.

Home.headline: Your perfect wardrobe starts with structure.
Home.summary: {serviceCount, plural, one {# service direction connects wardrobe strategy with studio execution.} other {# service directions connect wardrobe strategy with studio execution.}}

Styleguide.heroSummary: A compact component showcase for the PURITY styling layer on top of shadcn Base UI.
Styleguide.pathwaySummary: Service, offer, and pathway cards share spacing, borders, and restrained contrast.
Styleguide.offerSummary: A quiet container for services, courses, and collection offers.
Styleguide.featureTwo: No page-specific styles for common blocks.
Styleguide.featureThree: Focus and hover states stay visible.
Styleguide.motionSummary: Use short reveal, opacity, and drawer transitions only.
Styleguide.processSummary: The process component covers methodology, atelier flow, and school curriculum steps.
Styleguide.stepOneSummary: Define form, fabric, palette, and current wardrobe needs.
Styleguide.stepTwoSummary: Translate the brief into silhouettes, looks, and a decision system.
Styleguide.stepThreeSummary: Move from lookbook to fitting, atelier, school, or collection path.
Styleguide.pricingSummary: Price rows keep currency and explanatory notes scan-friendly.
Styleguide.priceNote: Example only; real content comes from typed service data.
Styleguide.atelierNote: Hourly pricing is preserved as a first-class content shape.
Styleguide.bookingSummary: A concise booking block keeps the next step visible beside editorial content.
Styleguide.portfolioSummary: Abstract generated media stays clearly separate from approved client proof.
Styleguide.componentsSummary: Buttons, fields, overlays, tabs, alerts, and separators keep their shadcn API.
Styleguide.alertSummary: Alerts preserve visible contrast and concise text.
Styleguide.accordionSummary: The PURITY layer changes theme and composition, not primitive behavior.
Styleguide.dialogSummary: Overlay behavior comes from the shadcn Base UI component.
Styleguide.sheetSummary: Drawer motion follows the global reduced-motion setting.
Styleguide.tokensSummary: Core surfaces and the production heading scale remain visible beside the primitives.
